text.title: sec-codeql-autofix-on-pr Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for sec-codeql-autofix-on-pr as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Marking the CodeQL check as "informational" because the team is overwhelmed by alerts during onboarding.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Once the gate is advisory, both humans and agents stop reading it; baseline the existing alerts as "won't fix" once, then keep the gate hard for everything new.

failure-mode.description: Dismissing Autofix alerts as "false positive" without recording a reason, just to clear the queue.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Dismissals without `--reason` poison the audit trail; pick `false-positive`, `won-t-fix`, or `used-in-tests` so future scans and compliance reviews can replay the decision.
